title: Velvety Nostalgic Rice Stir-fry
description: A diabetic-friendly Korean dish featuring sour and velvety textures with the addition of sake to add depth and complexity.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C). Rinse and cook the rice as per package instructions.
Chop vegetables into bite-sized pieces, ensuring they are uniformly sized for even cooking. Mince garlic finely.
In a mixing bowl, combine soy sauce, gochujang, sake, sugar, and salt. Mix until smooth and all ingredients are well combined.
Add minced garlic to the vegetable mixtures. Toss gently with tongs or spatula to coat evenly.
Pour the seasoned mixture over the cooked rice in a shallow baking dish. Use your hands to evenly distribute the mixture throughout the rice, ensuring each grain is coated.
Bake for 15 minutes until heated through and slightly caramelized on top. Garnish with additional chopped vegetables or sesame seeds if desired.
